options.a: Snow so water-saturated that water drains from it when picked up by hand or splatters when stepped on forcefully.
options.b: Snow compressed into a solid mass that resists further compression; specific gravity 0.5 and over.
options.c: Loose snow that can be blown, or compacted snow that falls apart on release; specific gravity up to 0.35.
options.d: Snow that sticks together when compacted by hand and tends to form a snowball; specific gravity 0.35 to under 0.5.
